tagline: Professional help with a personal touch

hero.headline:
50 Years of Pool Expertise Right in
Your Neighborhood
hero.subheadline: Since 1976, Portland families have trusted The Pool And Spa House to keep their pools and spas in perfect shape. Five locations, free water analysis, and a team that actually picks up the phone — so you can stop worrying and start swimming.
checkmarks: Free water analysis at any location

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Care<br class="hidden md:block">Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From water chemistry to hot tub sales, our factory-trained experts handle everything so you can enjoy your pool and spa without the guesswork.

cards.title: Water Analysis & Chemical Care
cards.description: Bring in a water sample and get a complimentary analysis using ALEX Pro technology. We create a customized care plan so your water stays balanced, safe, and crystal clear.

cards.title: Pool Equipment & Parts
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, solar heating, and replacement parts for every major brand. Our team helps you find exactly the right fit — no guessing, no wrong orders.

cards.title: Professional Pool & Spa Service
cards.description: Maintenance, repairs, and installations handled by factory-trained technicians who know Pacific Northwest pools inside and out. We get it right the first time.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Sales
cards.description: Find the perfect hot tub for your backyard and budget. Our experts guide you through selection, delivery, and setup so you can soak stress-free from day one.

cards.title: In-Ground & Above-Ground Pools
cards.description: Planning your dream backyard? We help you design and select the right pool — in-ground or above-ground — tailored to your space, style, and Oregon climate.

cards.title: Pool School & Education
cards.description: Learn to maintain your pool like a pro through our SMART START digital campus. Hands-on classes and online courses that save you time and money long-term.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Pool & Spa Confidence

steps.title: Bring In a Water Sample
steps.description: Drop by any of our five Portland-area locations with a water sample. Our ALEX Pro system analyzes it in minutes and creates a personalized care plan — completely free.

steps.title: Get Expert Guidance
steps.description: Our knowledgeable staff walks you through exactly what your pool or spa needs. No upselling, no confusion — just honest recommendations from people who have been doing this for 50 years.

steps.title: Enjoy Perfect Water
steps.description: Follow your customized plan, grab everything you need in one stop, and get back to enjoying your pool or spa. Questions later? Just call — we actually answer the phone.

about.label: Why Portland Trusts Us
about.headline: Five Stores, One Family — Serving the Pacific Northwest Since 1976
about.description: For nearly 50 years, The Pool And Spa House has been the go-to resource for pool and spa owners across the Portland metro area. What started as a single store in 1976 has grown into five locations — Portland, Gresham, Tigard, Vancouver, and West Linn — all staffed by friendly experts who know your name. Led by Brendan Reilly, our team combines deep technical knowledge with the kind of personal attention that big-box stores simply cannot match.

features.title: Factory-Trained Technicians
features.description: Every team member receives hands-on training and ongoing education so you get accurate advice and expert service at every location.

features.title: Free Water Analysis at Every Store
features.description: Walk in with a sample, walk out with a complete care plan. Our ALEX Pro technology takes the guesswork out of water chemistry.

features.title: We Actually Pick Up the Phone
features.description: All inquiries answered within 24 hours — most same-day. No phone trees, no runaround, just real people who want to help.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool and spa is different. Visit any location for a free consultation and honest pricing tailored to your needs.

guarantee.headline: Our "Pacific Northwest Pool Promise"
guarantee.description: If you follow our customized water care plan and your pool or spa water is not balanced and clear, bring in another sample and we will make it right at no extra charge. We have stood behind our work since 1976 and that is not changing anytime soon.

faqs.question: How does the free water analysis work?
faqs.answer: Just bring a water sample to any of our five locations. Our ALEX Pro system analyzes it in minutes and generates a step-by-step care plan customized to your pool or spa. It is completely free, no purchase required.

faqs.question: Which location is closest to me?
faqs.answer: We have stores in Portland, Gresham, Tigard, Vancouver (WA), and West Linn. Visit our website or call us at 503-906-8118 and we will point you to the nearest location with the best hours for your schedule.

faqs.question: Do you service hot tubs as well as pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are The Pool AND Spa House for a reason. From hot tub sales and water care to repairs and replacement parts, our team handles every aspect of spa ownership.

faqs.question: What is the SMART START program?
faqs.answer: SMART START is our digital education campus designed for new pool and spa owners. It includes step-by-step lessons on water chemistry, equipment maintenance, and seasonal care — so you feel confident managing your investment from day one.

faqs.question: Can I get help choosing the right equipment or chemicals?
faqs.answer: That is what we are here for. Our staff are factory-trained and will recommend only what your pool or spa actually needs — no upselling. Bring in your water sample or describe your setup and we will guide you to the right products.

testimonials.name: Allison R.
testimonials.text: Luke helped me out today. He was so nice and taught me so much about water care! This store is very clean and organized and has a lot of supplies. I finally feel confident maintaining my pool.

testimonials.name: Susan O.
testimonials.text: After getting red sores from our hot tub, I went to The Pool And Spa House and worked with Jay. He diagnosed the problem immediately and got our water balanced perfectly. I will always appreciate Jay for making our hot tub safe and fun again.

testimonials.name: Martin S.
testimonials.text: Very knowledgeable and helpful staff. Jay, the store manager, was great — he explained everything clearly and did not try to push products I did not need. This is how a local business should be run.

contact.headline:
Ready to Take the Guesswork
Out of Pool Care?
contact.subtitle: Stop by any of our five locations for a free water analysis, or call us for expert advice. We have been helping Portland-area families since 1976 — and we would love to help you too.
benefits: Free water analysis at any location
Response within 24 hours — usually same day
50 years of trusted Pacific NW expertise
